pages.raw_text:
1t is not unlikely that the Inter
national Transfers union will be
represented in the Central Labor
union again in the near future. The
uion withdrew from the central
body some time ago because that
organization would not endorse the
truckmen's scale Of wages. 1t is
also reported that some of the
trucking firms that have been fight
ing the truck drivers and teamsters
for several years past may sign the
scale and hire union teamsters
hereafter. In regard to the action
of some of the transfers in organ
izing another union last Sunday
Business Agent Clifford did not
seem to be greatly alarmed, as he
said his union was the only one in
the city chartered by the Interna-
tional transfers and he did not
think there was any likelihood of
another charter being granted in
this city.
